header.title: Learn Buddy
header.subtitle: Your learning assistant
header.translatingHint: This may take a few seconds

hero.title: Learn any subject in a
hero.description: Get a complete and personalized study material, with summaries, exercises, visual maps and a study plan adapted to your pace.

features.summariesLong: Transform complex content into clear, objective summaries. Our AI identifies the most important points and organizes everything in a didactic way so you learn faster and retain more information.
features.mindMapsLong: Visualize knowledge uniquely with automatically generated mind maps. Connect ideas, see relationships, and memorize easily through intelligent visual representations.
features.exercisesLong: Practice with personalized exercises from your level up to challenge mode. Get instant AI correction, detailed explanations, and track your progress step by step.
features.communityLong: Share exercises, doubts and solutions with students worldwide — and earn buddies.
features.communityDetail: Post exercises, photos and doubts. Like, comment and donate buddies (credits) to help people who help you. Fully moderated and 100% free.
features.communityExample1: Post a photo of a tough exercise and get solutions from the community.
features.communityExample2: Donate buddies to the author of a solution that saved your test.
features.communityExample3: Filter by exercises, doubts, solutions or photos to find what you need.
features.chatBuddyLong: Chat with Learn Buddy AI to ask questions, solve exercises, get coding help, and more.
features.chatBuddyDetail: Your virtual tutor available 24/7. Ask questions about any subject, get step-by-step explanations, programming help, study guides and personalized materials. All in real time and 100% free.
features.chatBuddyExample1: Send a photo of a Math exercise and get a commented solution.
features.chatBuddyExample2: Ask for help debugging code in Python or any language.
features.chatBuddyExample3: Request a personalized study guide for any exam or competition.

install.confirmInstall: Do you want to install Learn Buddy on your device?
install.appInstalledDesc: Learn Buddy is on your home screen. Just open it and start studying!
install.installDesc: Install the app on your device for quick access, just like a native app!
install.installNowHint: Click above and confirm to install directly.
install.desktopTitle: 💻 Step by step — Computer (Chrome or Edge)
install.desktopStep3: Look at the address bar. You may see an install icon (⊕ or 📥) on the right side.
install.desktopStep4: If the icon doesn't appear: click the 3 dots (⋮) in the top right corner. Look for "Install page as app" or "Install Learn Buddy" and click it.
install.desktopStep5: Click "Install" to confirm. Done! The app will appear on your desktop and Start menu. 🎉
install.desktopNote: ⚠️ Important: This only works on the published site (studdybuddy.com).
install.androidStep1: Open Google Chrome on your Android phone.
install.androidStep3: Tap the 3 dots (⋮) in the top right corner.
install.androidStep4: Tap "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
install.androidStep5: Tap "Install" to confirm. The Learn Buddy icon will appear on your home screen! 🎉
install.androidNote: 💡 Tip: Chrome may automatically show an install prompt at the bottom of the screen. Just tap it!
install.iosStep1: Open Safari (Apple's default browser — blue compass icon).
install.iosStep1Note: → Note: On iPhone/iPad, this only works in Safari! It won't work in Chrome or other browsers.
install.iosStep3: Tap the Share button — the square with an upward arrow (⬆️) at the bottom of Safari.
install.iosStep4: Look for "Add to Home Screen". If it doesn't appear, scroll down and tap "More Actions..." — the option may be hidden there.
install.iosStep5: Tap "Add to Home Screen" and confirm by tapping "Add". Done! The Learn Buddy icon will appear on your home screen! 🎉
install.iosNote: 💡 Tip: On iPhone, "Add to Home Screen" may not appear in the main Share list. Scroll to the bottom and tap "More Actions" to find it.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Learn Buddy ("we", "our" or "the app") is a free educational platform developed by the Learn Buddy Development Team (EDLB). Our goal is to help students learn any subject with the help of artificial intelligence. Our virtual headquarters operates through the domain studdybuddy.com.br.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect only the data strictly necessary for the app to function:
privacy.s2L1: Account data: email, display name and encrypted password (when you create an account).
privacy.s2L2: Profile: optional avatar photo, which you can upload and remove at any time.
privacy.s2L3: Study history: searched topics, answered exercises, generated study plans and progress on the learning trail.
privacy.s2L4: Images: photos of exercises or materials you submit for OCR analysis (processed and automatically discarded by the AI).
privacy.s2L5: Technical data: preferred language, configuration preferences and anonymous usage statistics.
privacy.s3Intro: We use your data exclusively to:
privacy.s3L1: Generate personalized educational content (summaries, exercises, study plans).
privacy.s3L2: Keep your study history accessible across all devices.
privacy.s3L3: Manage the credit and gamification system (progress trail, ranking).
privacy.s3L4: Allow participation in study groups (only with your consent).
privacy.s3L5: Improve the quality of AI responses based on study context.
privacy.s3Outro: We never sell your data to third parties. We never use your data for targeted advertising.
privacy.s4Body: Learn Buddy uses the Google Gemini API to generate educational content. When you submit a topic, exercise or image, we process this information through Google's secure servers. The data sent to the AI is:
privacy.s4L1: Processed in real time to generate educational responses.
privacy.s4L2: Not permanently stored on Google servers for training purposes (per the current Gemini API policy).
privacy.s4Outro: Images sent for OCR analysis are converted to text and immediately discarded after processing.
privacy.s5Body: Learn Buddy uses localStorage and essential cookies to maintain your login session, language preferences and app settings. We do not use third-party tracking cookies, conversion pixels or behavioral analytics tools.
privacy.s6Body: Learn Buddy is intended for students of all ages. Children under 13 must use the app under the supervision of a legal guardian. We do not intentionally collect personal data from children without parental consent. If you are a guardian and discover that your child has provided us with personal data, contact us for immediate removal.
privacy.s7Intro: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data:
privacy.s7L1: TLS/SSL encryption for all data transmissions.
privacy.s7L2: Secure authentication via JWT with refresh tokens.
privacy.s7L3: Database-level security policies (RLS - Row Level Security).
privacy.s7L4: Permission validation on all read/write operations.
privacy.s7L5: File upload limits (max 2MB) to prevent abuse.
privacy.s8Intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s8L1: Access: view all the data we have about you (available on the Settings page).
privacy.s8L2: Correction: update your name, email or profile photo at any time.
privacy.s8L3: Deletion: request the complete removal of your account and all associated data.
privacy.s8Outro: To exercise these rights, contact us via the email listed below or use the app's Settings page.
privacy.s9Intro: We do not share your personal data with third parties, except:
privacy.s9L1: Google (Gemini API): only for real-time educational content processing.
privacy.s9L2: Infrastructure providers: hosting and database servers (operated under confidentiality agreements).
privacy.s9L3: Legal obligation: if we are required by law or court order to disclose information.
privacy.s10Body: We keep your data while your account is active. If you delete your account, all personal data is permanently removed within 30 days. Anonymized and aggregated data (such as usage statistics) may be retained for service improvement purposes, without individual identification.
privacy.s11Body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through an in-app notice or by email. The "last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last modified.
privacy.s12Intro: If you have questions, concerns or requests related to privacy, contact us:
privacy.footer: By using Learn Buddy, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.
